commonIssues:
Sometimes cards are cancelled during periodic audits if e-KYC is not done or if the family is found ineligible.

How to fix:

  • Check your status on the UP FCS portal using your Ration Card ID.
  • If cancelled, visit the Tehsil Supply Office with Aadhaar and income proof for restoration.
  • Ensure biometric e-KYC is done at the FPS shop immediately.

The amount of ration depends on the number of members (units) in the card. If units are missing, you get less ration.

How to fix:

  • Apply for "Addition of Member" via a Jan Seva Kendra.
  • Submit the Aadhaar of the missing member.
  • Once verified, the unit count will increase in the portal and the FPS machine.
